artifacts.summary: DovetailedTimelineQuot with Cantor prerequisites (1 sorry in density intermediate)
Analysis of density gap: dovetailed construction lacks pair-wise density

partial_progress.details: Phases 2-3 complete. Phase 1 has 1 sorry: dovetailedTimeline_has_intermediate requires pair-wise density not provided by DovetailedBuild. Phase 4-5 blocked. See handoff for resolution options.

review_reason: Plan v8 assumed DovetailedBuild provides DenselyOrdered via its density processing, but analysis shows it only adds density witnesses between points and their immediate forward witnesses, not between arbitrary pairs. Recommend falling back to TimelineQuot approach (Option 4 in handoff).
